name: ind-devices
description: IND-DEVICES — RAN Fault & Inventory Console. Single-SPA monorepo with Module Federation, Chakra UI WCAG 2.2, and AI accessibility agent.

scripts.start:mfes: concurrently -n shared,root,login,dashboard,devices -c cyan,blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run start:shared" "npm run start:root" "npm run start:login" "npm run start:dashboard" "npm run start:devices"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,shared,root,login,dashboard,devices -c white,cyan,blue,green,magenta,yellow "npm run start:server" "npm run start:shared" "npm run start:root" "npm run start:login" "npm run start:dashboard" "npm run start:devices"
